banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: An eligible full Irish driving-licence holder applying at an NDLS centre for a first-time (not replacement) 1949 Convention IDP ahead of a trip to the United States.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: All six eligibility fields hold their eligible value (holds a full licence; not a learner permit or non-EU/EEA licence holder; 3+ months remaining on licence; fewer than 12 penalty points; no active driving ban), so the flow falls through to applicant_details rather than exiting not-eligible.

documents.reason: not required: addressDiffersFromLicenceAddress is false and drivingLicenceType is 'irish' (not 'eu_eea')
